历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11045 → 21654 → 18223 → 21431 → 17572. In 2022, there was a clear gap (ranking significantly dropped), and then fluctuated upward in subsequent years. The 2025 baseline is about 17572, showing a forward trend in the last 3 years. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 71 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 122 in 2024, 128 in 2025, and 131 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2.3% compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition, which is neutral.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising: 144th in 2021 → 130th in 2022 → 118th in 2023 → 104th in 2024 → 93rd in 2025 → 87th in 2026. The ranking improvement reflects the enhancement of the school's comprehensive strength, which has a positive effect on application attractiveness. In 2023, the reputation was negative (teacher non-cooperation with nucleic acid testing incident), turning neutral/mixed in 2024 (score line stable). Douyin heat total ranking 32nd, rated as 'relatively hot', short video exposure medium to high, reflecting certain attention. Hainan University is in the fifth; the school features tropical agriculture, law, marine, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with the school's offerings in computer, electronic information, automation, etc. The popularity of related majors has a pulling effect on overall applications. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is about 114,000 (estimated based on recent proportion), a decrease of about 3.3% compared to 2025, with a slight contraction in examinee scale, slightly easing competition pressure. Hainan University is located in Hainan Province, far from Heilongjiang Province across provinces, with weak regional preference. The school's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang is about 2.2% (2025), at a medium-low level, cross-province application needs to consider regional adaptation factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 17572, a slight expansion of 2.3% in 2026 plan, continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhanced application attractiveness), a decrease of about 3.3% in Physics Category examinees (slightly eased competition), and high popularity of related majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 17699, with a range of 17199–18199.
